name: Claudeman
description: Web UI control plane for managing Claude Code sessions in tmux. Provides multi-session dashboard, mobile-optimized terminal with local echo, subagent visualization, respawn controller, and TypeScript/Node.js backend with Fastify.
scan_summary: Full TypeScript/Node.js web application (not a traditional skill file). MIT licensed. Curl-pipe-bash install (curl -fsSL install.sh | bash) installs Node.js, tmux, Claude CLI, clones repo to ~/.claudeman/app, and builds. Runs a local web server on port 3000. 1435 tests noted in README. Manages tmux sessions and Claude Code processes. install.sh reviewed: uses set -euo pipefail, checks versions, supports NONINTERACTIVE mode.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
